subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! In truth thou art firm and resolute, and art standing steadfast in service to the survivors of the martyrs [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان فی الحقیقه ثابت و راسخی و بخدمت بازماندگان شهدا قائم قامت و
subcodes.subjects: @education of children; moral education, @martyrs and martyrdom, @firmness in the Covenant, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
